languages.text: {n}Идира бросает на вас осторожный взгляд.{/n} "Не вини их. Когда эта тварь вопит, даже мои шепотки тонут в ее визге — что уж про простых смертных говорить..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Идира бросает на вас осторожный взгляд.{/n} "Не вини их. Когда эта тварь вопит, даже мои шепотки тонут в ее визге — что уж про простых смертных говорить..."
traits.speaker: IdiraCompanion

languages.text: {n}Idira casts a wary glance at you.{/n} "Don't blame them. When that beast shrieks, it smothers even my whispers. What hope do mere mortals have..."
languages.original_text: {n}Идира бросает на вас осторожный взгляд.{/n} "Не вини их. Когда эта тварь вопит, даже мои шепотки тонут в ее визге — что уж про простых смертных говорить..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Idira casts a wary glance at you.{/n} "Do not blame them. When that beast shrieks, even my murmurings drown in its screech. What hope have common mortals..."
{n}Idira casts a wary glance at you.{/n} "Do not blame them. When that beast shrieks, even my murmurings drown in its screech. What hope have common mortals..."
{n}Idira casts a wary glance at you.{/n} "Do not blame them. When that beast shrieks, even my whispers are blotted out. What hope do mere mortals have..."
{n}Idira casts a wary glance at you.{/n} "Do not blame them. When that beast shrieks, even my whispers are blotted out. What hope do mere mortals have..."
{n}Idira casts a wary glance at you.{/n} "Don't blame them. When that beast shrieks, it smothers even my whispers. What hope do mere mortals have..."

languages.text: {n}Idira te mira, cansada.{/n} «No les culpe. El alarido de esa bestia calla hasta a mis susurros. ¿Qué esperanza puede quedarles a unos simples mortales?».
languages.original_text: {n}Idira casts a wary glance at you.{/n} "Do not blame them. When that beast shrieks, even my whispers are blotted out. What hope do mere mortals have..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Idira te mira, cansada.{/n} «No les culpe. El alarido de esa bestia calla hasta a mis susurros. ¿Qué esperanza puede quedarles a unos simples mortales?».

languages.text: {n}伊迪拉向你投来谨慎的一瞥。{/n}“别怪他们。那怪物一尖叫，连我的低语都被彻底淹没了。区区凡人，又能有什么指望……”
languages.original_text: {n}Idira casts a wary glance at you.{/n} "Do not blame them. When that beast shrieks, even my whispers are blotted out. What hope do mere mortals have..."

traits.locale_text: {n}伊迪拉向你投来谨慎的一瞥。{/n}“别怪他们。那怪物一尖叫，连我的低语都被彻底淹没了。区区凡人，又能有什么指望……”

languages.text: {n}Idira vous lance un regard prudent.{/n} « Ne soyez pas trop {mf|dur|dure} avec eux. Lorsque la bête hurle, elle oblitère jusqu'aux murmures dans mon esprit. Comment de simples mortels pourraient-ils résister ? »
languages.original_text: {n}Idira casts a wary glance at you.{/n} "Do not blame them. When that beast shrieks, even my whispers are blotted out. What hope do mere mortals have..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Idira vous lance un regard prudent.{/n} « Ne soyez pas trop {mf|dur|dure} avec eux. Lorsque la bête hurle, elle oblitère jusqu'aux murmures dans mon esprit. Comment de simples mortels pourraient-ils résister ? »

languages.text: {n}İdira sana temkinli bir bakış atıyor.{/n} "Onları suçlamayalım. Yaratık çığlık attığında fısıltılarım bile bastırılıyor. Sıradan ölümlüler ne yapabilir ki..."
languages.original_text: {n}Idira casts a wary glance at you.{/n} "Do not blame them. When that beast shrieks, even my whispers are blotted out. What hope do mere mortals have..."

traits.locale_text: {n}İdira sana temkinli bir bakış atıyor.{/n} "Onları suçlamayalım. Yaratık çığlık attığında fısıltılarım bile bastırılıyor. Sıradan ölümlüler ne yapabilir ki..."

languages.text: {n}Idira wirft dir einen vorsichtigen Blick zu.{/n} "Gebt ihnen keine Schuld. Wenn diese Bestie schreit, verstummen selbst meine Flüsterstimmen. Welche Hoffnung haben da normale Sterbliche ..."
languages.original_text: {n}Idira casts a wary glance at you.{/n} "Do not blame them. When that beast shrieks, even my whispers are blotted out. What hope do mere mortals have..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Idira wirft dir einen vorsichtigen Blick zu.{/n} "Gebt ihnen keine Schuld. Wenn diese Bestie schreit, verstummen selbst meine Flüsterstimmen. Welche Hoffnung haben da normale Sterbliche ..."

languages.text: {n}イディラは警戒しながら君を見つめた。{/n}「彼らを責めないで。その獣が叫ぶと、私のささやきさえ消えてしまう。人間にはどうすることもできないだろう…」
languages.original_text: {n}Idira casts a wary glance at you.{/n} "Don't blame them. When that beast shrieks, it smothers even my whispers. What hope do mere mortals have..."
